summary: Phase 4 Testing COMPLETE. 12/12 backend API tests PASSED (100%). Frontend onboarding UI fully tested: 10 industry cards, selection highlight, continue/skip flow, success screen with template name, auto-redirect to dashboard. All features working as expected.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Returns 200 with primaryIndustry field in user object
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user with primaryIndustry field
POST /api/auth/onboarding - Returns 401 without auth token
POST /api/auth/onboarding - Returns 400 for invalid industry
POST /api/auth/onboarding - Returns 400 for missing industry
POST /api/auth/onboarding with GRAPHIC_DESIGN - Creates 'Logo Design Project' template
GET /api/workflow-templates - Returns seeded templates with stage counts
GET /api/workflow-templates/:id - Returns template with full stage details
POST /api/auth/onboarding - Accepts all valid industry types
GET /api/leads - Regression: Still returns leads with count wrapper
GET /api/leads/stats - Regression: Returns dashboard stats
GET /api/portfolio - Regression: Portfolio endpoint works
GET /api/analytics/dashboard - Regression: Analytics endpoint works
Frontend: Onboarding page loads at /onboarding with data-testid='industry-onboarding'
Frontend: 10 industry cards displayed (photography, videography, graphic-design, web-design, illustration, fine-art, sculpture, branding, content-creation, other)
Frontend: Continue button disabled when no selection, enabled when industry selected
Frontend: Skip for now link navigates to /dashboard
Frontend: Selection highlight shows violet border + checkmark on selected industry
Frontend: Continue button triggers API call and shows success screen
Frontend: Success screen displays 'You're all set!', industry name, and template name
Frontend: Auto-redirect to /dashboard after ~2.5 seconds from success screen
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all features after onboarding
Frontend: Add Lead modal shows Project Type selector (Service, Commission, Project, Product Sale)
Frontend: Dashboard Kanban shows lead cards with industry badges
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding endpoint properly validates primaryIndustry against 10 valid enum values
seedTemplatesForUser correctly maps industry to template (GRAPHIC_DESIGN → Logo Design Project)
Templates are system templates (isSystem=true) with proper stage definitions
Frontend IndustryOnboarding component handles all states: selection, loading, success, error
Signup flow correctly redirects to /onboarding after auto-login
Token stored in localStorage is passed correctly to onboarding API
seed_data_creation: Onboarding called with GRAPHIC_DESIGN, WEB_DESIGN, SCULPTURE, BRANDING industries - templates created for each
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 onboarding fully tested. User has templates for: Wedding Photography (PHOTOGRAPHY), Portrait Commission (FINE_ART), Logo Design Project (GRAPHIC_DESIGN, WEB_DESIGN, BRANDING). Industry types tested: PHOTOGRAPHY, VIDEOGRAPHY, GRAPHIC_DESIGN, WEB_DESIGN, ILLUSTRATION, FINE_ART, SCULPTURE, BRANDING, CONTENT_CREATION, OTHER. Onboarding data-testids: industry-onboarding, industry-grid, industry-{type}, onboarding-continue, onboarding-skip. Project at /app/kolor-studio-v2/.
screenshots_taken: 02_onboarding_selection.png - BRANDING selected with violet border + checkmark
onboarding_success.png - Success screen with Web Design industry and Logo Design Project template
dashboard_after_onboarding.png - Dashboard with 19 leads after onboarding
add_lead_modal.png - Add Lead modal with Project Type selector
